Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Mark E. Burton of the law offices of Audet & Partners LLP (415-568-2555) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorneys, Keith A. Jacoby and Sophia Behnia of the law offices of Littler Mendelson PC (415-276-2561) appear as counsels for defendants/petitioning party

The Court discloses for the record her prior social acquaintance with plaintiff counsel, Mr. Burton. Counsel for defendants waive any irregularity and stipulate to proceed.

The Court states findings and issues tentative ruling to grant the petition.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

PETITIONERS RASIER LLC, RASIER-CA LLC, and UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED. Court evaluates, agrees with decision of arbitrator and finds good cause as set forth on the record. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)
